title: Subtask Column Order per View
excerpt:
Description
We would like to be able to rearrange the subtask columns depending on view. Currently, when you move subtask columns, they move for all views. Having the ability to fully customize views would be very useful…

posts.author: aubreermd (Aubree)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We would like to be able to rearrange the subtask columns depending on view. Currently, when you move subtask columns, they move for all views. Having the ability to fully customize views would be very useful.

What are you trying to achieve

Subtask column customization based on views within the same board.
